src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest import with jakarta.servlet.http.HttpServletRequest to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3/JDK 17.
Wrap logging statements with isInfoEnabled checks to prevent unnecessary string concatenation and object serialization when logging is disabled.
Replace external JSONUtil utility with internal JsonUtil for JSON serialization tasks.
Add client IP address logging using a dedicated utility class instead of relying on request.getRemoteHost().
Remove unused import java.lang.reflect.Parameter and comment out related code that was likely causing issues or is no longer needed.
Use diamond operator for HashMap instantiation to adhere to modern Java coding standards.
Improve exception logging by passing the exception object to the logger instead of converting it to a string, allowing for proper stack trace handling.
Remove the deprecated Spring Security OAuth2 authorization server configuration class to migrate to Spring Authorization Server.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Deleted the entire AuthorizationServerConfiguration.java file which extended AuthorizationServerConfigurerAdapter.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Replace Spring Security OAuth2 ClientDetailsService with custom OauthClientService and ScopeDefinitionService to support dynamic client and scope definitions.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `clientDetailsService.loadClientByClientId` with `oauthClientService.findByClientId` and added loop to fetch `ScopeDefinition` for each scope.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Update the model attributes passed to the view to include application name and human-readable scope definitions instead of raw client details.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `model.put("client", client)` to `model.put("applicationName", client.getApplicationName())` and populated scopes with definitions.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Simplify the helper method for extracting the host from a redirect URI by removing complex URI reconstruction and exception handling.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Replaced `getHost` method logic with simple string concatenation based on `uri.getScheme()`, `uri.getHost()`, and `uri.getPort()`.

src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.general_idea: Adjust request mapping paths and parameter requirements to align with the new controller structure.
src/main/java/com/revengemission/sso/oau.human_impl: Changed `@RequestMapping("/oauth/confirm_access")` to `@RequestMapping("/confirm_access")` under class-level `@RequestMapping("/oauth")` and made `redirect_uri` required.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.0.0.RELEASE to 3.0.5 to align with Java 17 ecosystem.
Update project properties to target Java 17 instead of Java 8.
Replace deprecated spring-security-oauth2 with the new Spring Authorization Server module required for Spring Boot 3.
Add Spring Data JPA starter for database persistence support.
Add Liquibase core for database schema migration management.
Switch to the new MySQL Connector/J artifact ID compatible with modern Spring Boot versions.
Add explicit Spring Security starter dependency.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype for Java 8+ date/time API support.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code.
Add Apache Commons Text library for string manipulation utilities.
Add MapStruct for type-safe bean mapping.
Add custom captcha library dependency.
Add Spring Boot Cache starter for caching support.
Add Caffeine as the caching provider.
Add Spring Boot Actuator for production-ready features.
Add Spring Boot DevTools for development-time features.
Configure Maven resources plugin to prevent filtering of binary font and key files.
Configure Maven compiler plugin with Java 17 source/target and annotation processors for Lombok and MapStruct.
Add versions-maven-plugin to manage dependency updates.
Remove Thymeleaf Spring Security 4 extras, likely migrating away from Thymeleaf or updating security integration.
Remove explicit logging starter as it is included in spring-boot-starter.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly define server port and context path properties.
Configure the size of the scheduling task pool.
Configure file-based logging with path and history retention.
Enable and configure Tomcat access logs with rotation.
Update MySQL connection string to include timezone and SSL settings required for newer drivers.
Switch to the MySQL 8.0 compatible JDBC driver class.
Configure HikariCP connection pool max lifetime.
Configure JPA Hibernate settings including DDL auto and dialect.
Enable Liquibase for database schema migration.
Add application-specific configuration for JWT, OAuth2, and security features.
Add placeholder configuration for WeChat Mini Program integration.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Upgrade Bootstrap Grid CSS from version 4.0.0 to 5.2.3 to adopt modern CSS variables and remove IE11-specific prefixes.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire bootstrap-grid.css content with v5.2.3 distribution, switching from hardcoded values to CSS custom properties (--bs-*) and removing @-ms-viewport.

src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.general_idea: Replace Bootstrap 4.0.0 CSS with Bootstrap 5.2.3 to align with modern frontend standards and Spring Boot 2.4+ defaults.
src/main/resources/static/assets/bootstr.human_impl: Replaced entire content of bootstrap-reboot.css from v4.0.0 to v5.2.3, introducing CSS variables and removing IE11-specific hacks.
